component.name: Quite Listie
component.summary: Lists and checklists that sync with Nextcloud

description.p: Quite Listie manages lists and checklists with file-based collaboration and Nextcloud sync. It is the native GNOME edition, sharing the .listie file format and Nextcloud sync with the iOS, iPadOS and macOS apps, so lists move between platforms.

ul.li: Open .listie files directly, or sync lists over Nextcloud (WebDAV)
Offline-first sync with three-way merge and automatic conflict resolution
List, per-list map, global locations map, kanban, and markdown preview views
Colour-coded labels, quantity tracking, and markdown notes on items
Due-date reminders with Today and Scheduled smart boxes and desktop notifications
Pin items to locations and open them on a map
Markdown import and export, and shareable deeplinks
